title: Finding an Injured Person 发现有人受伤
scene: Sam在公园里发现一个小朋友摔倒了，去帮他。

lines.en: Hey, are you OK? I saw you fall.
lines.zh: 嘿，你还好吗？我看到你摔倒了。

lines.en: My knee hurts. I think I scraped it.
lines.zh: 我的膝盖好疼。好像擦破了。

lines.en: Let me see. It is bleeding a little.
It stings! What should I do?
I have some tissues. Let me wipe it clean first.
lines.zh: 我有纸巾。让我先擦干净。

lines.en: I know. Let me put my band-aid on it.
lines.zh: 我知道。让我把创可贴贴上。

lines.en: Thank you. Do you think I need a doctor?
lines.zh: 谢谢你。你觉得我需要看医生吗？

lines.en: It is just a small scrape. You will be fine.
lines.zh: 只是小擦伤。你会没事的。

lines.en: You are very kind. Can you help me walk home?
lines.zh: 你真好。你能帮我走回家吗？
